name: The Netlight Beacon
description: Relight the Old Netlight so boats can find the harbor after dark again.

phases.name: Clear the salvage
phases.description: Haul storm debris off the lighthouse stair and fund the first repairs.

phases.name: Wire the lamp
phases.description: Rebuild the beacon housing — and Mara has to trust you to hand over the lamp.

unlocks: Relights the harbor and opens the observatory deck.

ceremony.line: The Old Netlight burns again — boats can find us in the dark.
I can finally fish past dusk. Thank you.

name: Market Lane Canopies
description: Re-canopy Market Lane so the stalls trade rain or shine.

phases.name: Frame the stalls
phases.description: Mill planks and frame the canopy posts down the lane.

phases.name: Stitch the canvas
phases.description: String the salt-canvas awnings and trim them with shell weights.

unlocks: Market Lane reopens with rain-day stalls and traveling vendors.

ceremony.line: The lane's alive again — even in the rain.
I'll set a seed stall up here. It's perfect.

name: Belltide Boardwalk
description: Rebuild the storm-broken boardwalk out to Belltide Marsh.

phases.name: Lay the planks
phases.description: Deck the boardwalk back across the tide flat.

phases.name: Raise the rails
phases.description: Add safety rails — and earn Sol's confidence to open the marsh route.

unlocks: Opens Belltide Marsh — forage, birding, and medicine routes.

ceremony.line: The boardwalk reaches the marsh again. So much to study out there.
Careful on the flats — but it's beautiful, isn't it?
